calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc For Default Judgment In Validation Action
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Continued To Jun-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Ntc For Default Judgment In Validation Action
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing on Validation Action.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Wayne Snodgrass, Deputy City Attorney, Mark Blake, Deputy City Attorney, and Buck Delventhal, Deputy City Attorney appearing for Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco.
The court obtained jurisdiction over all interested persons under Code of Civil Procedure Section861 and Government Code Section 6063.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court entered Default Judgment in Validation Action.
See scanned Judgment in Register of Actions.
Court signed Judgment in open court.
